calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Continued To May-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Gemma O'Keeffe for and with (administrator) Kieran Hegarty.

Ms. O'Keeffe reported that there has been a typo, that the balance on hand is actually $286,040.68, that they have spent less than $50,000.00, that they have a printout from the bank and that the money has been there and is accumulating. The Court stated that written responses would be helpful, that the Court needs a public record to analyze and have as part of our record and that it is prepared to give time to submit the responses. Mr. Hegarty stated that he has waivers from all sisters, that there was property in Oregon that had to be taken care of, that there was a funeral in Ireland and that he has an email from the attorney of his sisters. Ms. O'Keeffe stated that there is an attorney in Ireland representing the sisters, that the sisters signed the waiver knowing what was there, that Angela is Mr. Hegarty's wife and asked if rather that making all 3 sisters sign a waiver again if it would be acceptable to get something from the solicitor stating that they knowingly and willingly signed the waivers. The Court agreed to this request. Mr. Hegarty stated that they have everything signed that was required, that they have a letter from the attorney, that the money has not been touched in 2 years and that they can account for the $50,000.00. The accounting petition was continued to May 16, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for responses to be filed.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

March 30, 2021:
Ms. O'Keeffe contacted the Court in March of 2021 to clarify that the Attorney in Ireland only represents one Sister.
